features: 【Package Includes】: You will receive 20 pieces Pastel Rainbow paper napkins, the sufficient quantities and exquisite design are able to meet your daily and party needs.

【Premium Material】: All napkins are made from pure wood pulp paper and are printed with food-grade water-based ink, which is environmentally friendly and durable, and the prints are colorful and perfect for any parties!

【Napkin Measurement】: The napkins measure about 6.5 x 6.5 inches folded and 13 x13 inches inches unfolded, the right size to meet your various needs, you can easily use it to wipe away grease and stains on the table.

【Colorful Paper Tissue Decorations Widely Application 】：These versatile serviettes are ideal for weddings gatherings, events, and daily use at home, such as birthdays, weddings, baby showers, and farewell parties,ensuring you have an ample supply for any occasion.

【Celebration and Practicality】: Our napkins blend celebration with practicality. Not only do they contribute to the visual appeal of your events, but they also serve as functional essentials. Let your gatherings be a harmonious blend of style and convenience, making every moment memorable with these exceptional paper napkins.
description: Party Napkins,Birthday Napkins,Colorful Paper Napkins Features: Print Appearance;Recycled paper napkins,made of recycled wood pulp, printed with food-grade, non toxic dyes; biodegradable and compostable that good quality and excellent value Adapt to the venue: Birthday serviette napkins for many occasions, such as for the Birthday Party, Christmas, Halloween, Children's Day, Pet Party, Valentine's Day, Baby Showers, Wedding Anniversaries, Family Reunions, Home Decoration, Garden Party, Graduation.
